rules.name: Repeated Failed Login
rules.description: Repeated failed password attempts can indicate brute-force or credential guessing activity.

rules.name: Invalid User Attempt
rules.description: Attempts against invalid usernames can indicate account enumeration or opportunistic probing.

rules.name: Access Denied Event
rules.description: Access denied events may indicate unauthorized access attempts or misconfigured permissions.

rules.name: Suspicious PowerShell Usage
rules.description: PowerShell activity can be benign, but it is also commonly used in attacker tradecraft.

rules.name: Encoded Command Detected
rules.description: Encoded commands are often used to hide command intent and should be reviewed carefully.

rules.name: Authentication Failure
rules.description: Authentication failure patterns may indicate credential abuse or service misconfiguration.
